title: Lohn-Simulator XAL GmbH v10.0 – Full Payroll App with PAP Lohnsteuer 2026

requirements.text: Embed the official PAP Lohnsteuer 2026 engine (BigDecimal, SqLohnsteuer, PapLohnsteuer classes as provided in the user's HTML) directly in the frontend codebase as a self-contained TypeScript/JS module so it can be called client-side without any backend round-trip.
acceptanceCriteria: BigDecimal, SqLohnsteuer, and PapLohnsteuer classes are importable from a dedicated module (e.g. frontend/src/lib/lohnsteuer2026.ts).
No jQuery dependency — the jQuery shim stub is handled internally.
Calling sqLst.calculate() with a monthly gross value returns correct Lohnsteuer, Soli, KiSt, and SV figures consistent with the reference HTML.

requirements.text: Implement a payroll data entry section (Lohndaten Erfassung) with the following input rows, each with highlighted yellow input fields: Stundenlohn 1 (quantity hours + hourly rate), Nachtzuschlag 40% (hours), Schmutzzulage 10% (auto-calculated from base wage), Feiertag (hours), Verpflegungstage (count × €14.00 fixed rate), and Wohn-/Tätigkeitspauschale (direct euro amount). Display computed row amounts and a total Abrechnungs-Brutto footer.
acceptanceCriteria: All six wage rows are rendered in a table with Quantity, Factor, and Amount columns.
Schmutzzulage is auto-calculated as 10% of the base Stundenlohn amount with no manual input.
Verpflegung uses a fixed rate of €14.00 per day.
Abrechnungs-Brutto footer sums all rows and updates reactively on any input change.

requirements.text: Implement a tax and social-insurance parameter panel (Steuer- & SV-Parameter) with controls for: Steuerklasse (I–VI), Kinderfreibetrag (0–4.0 in 0.5 steps), Bundesland (all 16 German states), KV-Zusatzbeitrag % (numeric input, default 2.9), PV-Situation dropdown (kinderlos ü23, 1 Kind/u23, 2–5+ Kinder u25), Geburtsjahr (numeric), Kirchensteuer (yes/no), and a derived KiSt-Satz display (8% for BW/BY, 9% otherwise, '--' if disabled).
acceptanceCriteria: All parameter controls render with their correct default values (StKl I, ZKF 0, NW, KVZ 2.9, kinderlos, 1990, KiSt yes).
Changing any parameter immediately triggers recalculation.
KiSt-Satz display shows 8% for BW/BY, 9% for all other states, and '--' when Kirchensteuer is disabled.

requirements.text: Implement a payroll results panel (Abrechnungsergebnis) on the right side of the layout showing: Steuer-Brutto, itemized tax deductions (Lohnsteuer, Soli, Kirchensteuer, Σ Steuerabzüge), itemized AN social-insurance deductions (RV 9.3%, AV 1.3%, KV including gesetzl. and Zusatzbeitrag sub-rows, PV, Σ SV-Abzüge), steuerfreie/pauschale Bezüge section (Nachtzuschlag, Verpflegung, Wohn-/Tätigkeitspauschale, Σ Steuerfrei), Abrechnungs-Netto, and a highlighted Auszahlungsbetrag box (Steuer-Netto + steuerfreie Bezüge).
acceptanceCriteria: All result fields update reactively whenever any input or parameter changes.
KV sub-rows for gesetzlicher Anteil and Zusatzbeitrag are displayed as indented sub-items.
Auszahlungsbetrag = Steuer-Netto + steuerfreie Bezüge, displayed prominently in a blue highlight box.

requirements.text: Implement an employer cost breakdown section (Arbeitgeber-Anteile & Gesamtkosten) showing AG shares: RV (AG), AV (AG), KV gesetzlicher Anteil (AG), KV Zusatzbeitrag (AG), PV (AG), Insolvenzumlage, Σ AG-Sozialversicherung, pauschale LSt on Wohn-/Tätigkeitspauschale (16.86%), and a prominent Gesamtbelastung Arbeitgeber total (Brutto + AG-SV + pauschale LSt).
acceptanceCriteria: All AG cost fields are derived from the PAP engine output and update reactively.
Pauschale LSt = Wohn-/Tätigkeitspauschale × 16.86%.
Gesamtbelastung AG total is displayed large and prominently in an amber-toned card.

requirements.text: Implement an entrepreneur KPI panel (Unternehmer-Kennzahlen) showing: Kosten pro Stunde (Gesamtkosten AG ÷ Arbeitsstunden), Nettoquote (Auszahlung ÷ AG-Gesamtkosten × 100), Nebenkostenquote ((AG-SV + pauschale LSt) ÷ AG-Gesamtkosten × 100), Break-Even/Stunde (= Kosten pro Stunde), Angebot/Stunde (Break-Even × 1.20), DB1 (Umsatz mit Angebot − Abrechnungs-Brutto), and DB2 (DB1 − AG-SV − pauschale LSt).
acceptanceCriteria: All 7 KPI values update reactively.
Break-Even and Angebot/Stunde are visually distinguished (orange and green respectively).
DB2 is labeled as the true profit after all employer costs.

requirements.text: Implement employee master data inputs (Stammdaten) for Mitarbeiter name, Personal-Nr., and Abrechnungsmonat (free text, e.g. 'März 2026'), displayed in a top bar below the main header.
acceptanceCriteria: All three fields are editable inline.
Abrechnungsmonat is visually highlighted (blue border/text) to indicate importance.
Values are persisted to localStorage and restored on page load.

requirements.text: Persist all user inputs (wage inputs, parameter selections, and master data fields) to localStorage on every change, and restore them on page load. Provide a RESET button that clears localStorage and reloads the page after user confirmation.
acceptanceCriteria: All input field values survive a page refresh.
RESET button shows a confirmation dialog before clearing.
After reset, all fields revert to their default values.

requirements.text: Implement an Excel export (XLSX) that generates a structured spreadsheet with sections for Brutto-Bestandteile, Steuerabzüge, Sozialversicherung (AN), Steuerfreie Bezüge, Ergebnis, and Arbeitgeber-Anteile. The filename must include the Abrechnungsmonat and Mitarbeiter name.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the EXCEL button triggers a download of a .xlsx file.
The spreadsheet contains all six data sections with correct labels and values.
Filename format: Lohn_[Monat]_[Name].xlsx

requirements.text: Implement a PDF export using jsPDF + jsPDF-AutoTable that generates a payroll document with a header (title + Mitarbeiter info), a Brutto components table, a deductions and additions table, and a final Auszahlung line. The filename must include the Abrechnungsmonat.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the PDF button triggers a download of a .pdf file.
Both tables use a dark header style matching the app's color scheme.
Auszahlung is printed in bold at the bottom of the document.
Filename format: Lohn_[Monat].pdf

requirements.text: Apply a professional dark-slate and amber accent visual theme throughout the app: dark slate header/table headers (#1e293b / slate-800), yellow highlighted input fields, blue results panel on dark background (slate-900), amber employer costs card, green/orange KPI accents, and monospace (JetBrains Mono) for all numeric outputs. The layout must be responsive with a two-column grid (7/5 split) on desktop and single column on mobile.
acceptanceCriteria: All numeric result values use JetBrains Mono font.
Yellow/highlighted input fields are visually distinct from read-only display fields.
On screens ≥ lg breakpoint, the layout splits into a 7-column left pane and 5-column right pane.
On mobile, all sections stack vertically.

constraints: The PAP Lohnsteuer 2026 calculation logic (BigDecimal, SqLohnsteuer, PapLohnsteuer) must be preserved exactly as provided — do not alter the mathematical formulas.
All calculation logic runs client-side in the frontend; no payroll computation is sent to or performed by the backend.
Excel export uses the SheetJS (xlsx) library loaded from CDN or bundled; PDF export uses jsPDF + jsPDF-AutoTable.
Do not use jQuery — the jQuery shim used in the original HTML must be replaced with a no-op stub or removed entirely.
nonGoals: Internet Identity authentication for this feature.
Server-side payroll storage or audit logs.
Support for Teilmonat (partial month) calculations or Gleitzone edge cases beyond the standard monthly flow.
